name: Molasses-Ginger Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the softened butter or margarine and brown sugar until the mixture is light and fluffy.
2. Add molasses and egg; beat well.
3. Thoroughly blend flour, baking powder, ginger, salt, and baking soda in a separate bowl.
4. Add dry ingredients to the creamed mixture alternately with water; mix well.
5. Stir in raisins.
6. Pour the mixture into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes.
8. Cool thoroughly.
9. Sift powdered sugar over the top and cut into bars.
Makes 36 bars.
